MRKB.DisplaySizeHint: Set the display size. 'Contain' adjusts the image to fit within the canvas, 'Cover' adjusts it to cover the entire canvas, and 'Multi' overlays a blurred 'Cover' image behind the 'Contain' image.
MRKB.DisplayPositionHint: Set the position of the display on the canvas.
MRKB.DisplayOpacityHint: Set the opacity level of the display.
